rulings.Case Title: LUISA NICHOLS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, APRIL 19, 2011 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:30 AM, LINE 3. Defendant United Technologies Corp.¿s motion for summary adjudication is continued on the court¿s own motion to April 25. The court has been informed that this motion should be going off calendar, however it has not received a formal request by the moving party to take the motion off calendar. The motion will stay on calendar for April 25 until the court receives notice by the moving party to take the motion off calendar. = (220/HEK)
